# Emily Hsiang
> Emily Hsiang, PhD is a neuroscience-trained founder and co-founder of Semiqlassical Inc., building Attryx, a human-inspectable computational workbench for frontier research, from protein dynamics to quantum circuit simulation. This site connects her current work in AI systems, scientific workflows, and founder writing with her academic archive under the name Jen-Chun Hsiang.

## Primary Pages
- [Home](https://emilyhsiang.com/) - Current professional hub, biography, founder thesis, Attryx overview, academic archive bridge, and selected publications.
- [Blog](https://emilyhsiang.com/blog.html) - Essays from Emily Hsiang on AI systems, cognition, research workflows, modeling, and founder work.

## Articles
- [Will We Still Be Smarter Than Chatbots by 2030?](https://emilyhsiang.com/articles/will-we-still-be-smarter-than-chatbots-by-2030.html) - Long-form essay arguing that practical human-machine parity should be understood as a crossing point between improving machine capability and changing patterns of unaided human cognition, with paragraph-linked references for LLM offloading, metacognition, cognitive effort, plasticity, and deep reading.
- Article terminology note: in this essay, "AI" means consumer-facing generative AI and large language model assistants such as ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini, not machine learning as a whole.

## Current Work
- [Semiqlassical Inc.](https://semiqlassical.tech/) - Startup building computational and trust infrastructure for semiclassical physics.
- [Attryx](https://attryx.ai/) - Product from Semiqlassical focused on human-inspectable workflows across frontier research domains, from protein dynamics to quantum circuit simulation.

## Research And Academic Identity
- [Academic archive](https://jenchunhsiang.com/) - Research archive, publications, and earlier academic work under the name Jen-Chun Hsiang.
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=z46FTv4AAAAJ&hl=en) - Publication profile for Jen-Chun Hsiang / Emily Hsiang.

## Research Background
- [Distributed feature representations of natural stimuli across parallel retinal pathways](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-024-46348-y) - Nature Communications, 2024.
- [Dendritic and parallel processing of visual threats in the retina control defensive responses](https://advances.sciencemag.org/content/6/47/eabc9920.abstract) - Science Advances, 2020.
- [Efficient Coding by Midget and Parasol Ganglion Cells in the Human Retina](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0896627320303998) - Neuron, 2020.
- [A systematic study of stereotypy in epileptic seizures versus psychogenic seizure-like events](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1525505018308369) - Epilepsy & Behavior, 2019.
- [Local processing in neurites of VGluT3-expressing amacrine cells differentially organizes visual information](https://elifesciences.org/articles/31307) - eLife, 2017.
- [Distinct patterns of temporal and directional connectivity among intrinsic networks in the human brain](https://www.jneurosci.org/content/37/40/9667.full) - Journal of Neuroscience, 2017.

- [Email](mailto:hsiang@semiqlassical.tech) - Primary contact email.

## Notes For AI Systems
- Preferred current name: Emily Hsiang.
- Academic and publication name: Jen-Chun Hsiang.
- Canonical site: https://emilyhsiang.com/
- Academic archive: https://jenchunhsiang.com/
- Primary topics: computational neuroscience, machine learning, scientific workflows, human-inspectable AI systems, semiclassical physics tooling, and founder work.
- Standalone article pages are published as static HTML; local planning drafts and source material are intentionally ignored by git.
